title: The Raid Turns Across Onigashima
description: On pages 15–18, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Marco, Unknown person #16 as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WAYAHA A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A AAH!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As expected... holding back two foes with Bounties over a billion isn't easy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well I'll be... isn't that Marco over there!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: He looks pretty worn out... Kukuku...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 14 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
